message:
fix: nil guards, deterministic map trimming, safe watcher stop, and multiple robustness fixes

cmd/bv:
- Make map trimming deterministic: sort by value descending then key
  ascending before truncating, instead of non-deterministic Go map
  iteration order.
- Add nil guard for dependency pointers in depGraph construction.
- Fix copyFile to close dst before returning so write errors are caught.
- Populate beads_closed during history export deduplication pass.

internal/datasource:
- Fix validate.go: allow MaxJSONLErrorRate of 0.0 (was being overwritten
  with default 0.10 due to zero-value check).
- Make SourceWatcher.Stop() safe to call multiple times via sync.Once.

pkg/analysis:
- Add default branch to Snapshot.computeCounts so non-closed statuses
  (deferred, draft, etc.) count as open.
- Guard ComputeHistoricalVelocity against numWeeks <= 0 (default to 8).
- Fix GetVelocityTrend to use len(WeeklyVelocity) instead of
  WeeksAnalyzed field for half-point calculation.

pkg/correlation:
- Use map existence checks in buildHistories before assigning events
  and commits to avoid nil map assignment.
- Clamp normalized confidence to [0,1] in ExplainConfidence scorer.
- Populate BeadID in TemporalCorrelator FindCommitsInWindow results.

pkg/testutil:
- Add nil guards for dependency pointers in AssertDependencyExists,
  AssertNoCycles, and AssertHasCycle.

pkg/ui:
- Add bounds check for selectedIdx in GraphModel.SelectedIssue/View.
- Add nil guard for comment pointers in model.go viewport rendering.
- Use UTF-8-safe rune truncation in velocity_comparison label display.

cmd/bv/search_output.go:
- Use shared newRobotEncoder helper for consistent JSON output formatting.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -122,6 +122,7 @@ func (t *TemporalCorrelator) FindCommitsInWindow(window TemporalWindow) ([]Corre
 		reason := t.generateTemporalReason(window, files, pathHints)
 
 		commits = append(commits, CorrelatedCommit{
+			BeadID:      window.BeadID,
 			SHA:         sha,
 			ShortSHA:    shortSHA(sha),
 			Message:     info.Message,
